task_objective: feat(status): spin cloud-circle icon while Syncthing prepares upload
tests_added: renders a spinner-ring cloud icon for syncthing_pending_upload
applies the ring-spin animation class only to syncthing_pending_upload
design_decisions: Used inline SVG for the spinner-ring cloud icon to match existing patterns and avoid React icons serialization issues.
Added CSS keyframe usage for spinner-ring with transform-origin at 256px 256px.
Ensured CSS classes are correctly conditionally applied in the html renderer.
results: Implementation successful. All tests and quality gates passed.
